items.title: U.S. P&C 2026 Outlook: Competition Revs Up, Pricing Slows On Road Ahead
items.description: A softening pricing environment and increased competition in the personal auto space are among the issues facing US property and casualty insurers in 2026. Read more here.

items.title: Why Analysts See Travelers (TRV) Story Shifting As Pricing Risks Meet Underwriting Strengths
items.description: The latest update to Travelers Companies' modeled fair value trims the target only slightly, from about US$297.10 to about US$296.95, which mirrors how closely recent analyst views are clustering around the stock. This tiny shift reflects a tug of war between research that highlights strong underwriting execution and earnings power, and more cautious commentary that points to tougher pricing conditions in key property and casualty lines. Stay with this article to see how you can keep on top...

items.title: A Glimpse Into The Expert Outlook On Travelers Companies Through 7 Analysts
Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Outperform on Travelers Companies, Raises Price Target to $317
items.description: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   maintains Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $305 to $317.
